overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character exploring a fog-shrouded Victorian park. The character walks along cobblestone paths, through vine-covered pergolas, and past empty benches in the dense, desaturated atmosphere of Rosewater Park. The environment features historic stone architecture, overgrown vegetation, and heavy fog limiting visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy park pathway with stone balustrades

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a cobblestone path lined with stone balustrades, approaching a staircase through dense fog

entered.detail: stone railing with decorative pillars lining the pathway
bare deciduous trees visible through the fog
weathered stone steps leading upward to a higher terrace

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a fog-shrouded pathway bordered by stone balustrades and bare trees, approaching a set of stone steps that ascend into the mist.

events.description: ascends stone steps and enters a vine-covered pergola structure

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone steps and proceeding through a covered walkway draped with hanging vines

entered.detail: stone column structure with wooden beams covered in hanging vines

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the weathered stone steps and enters a pergola walkway, where hanging vines create a sheltered passage through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: open terrace with benches and ivy walls

events.description: character turns around to face the opposite direction on the terrace

agents.ego_description: walking along the open terrace past empty benches and an ivy-covered wall, then turning to survey the area

entered.detail: wooden park benches with metal frames arranged along the terrace
tall brick wall completely covered in dense ivy vegetation
vintage black lamppost with ornate design

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an open terrace, the character passes empty wooden benches and a tall ivy-covered brick wall, pausing to turn around near a vintage street lamp.

events.description: re-enters the vine-covered pergola from the terrace side

agents.ego_description: walking back through the pergola along the terrace edge overlooking the foggy lower park

entered.detail: returning to the stone pergola structure from the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The character returns through the vine-draped pergola, walking alongside the stone balustrade overlooking the fog-shrouded lower areas of the park.

events.description: exits pergola into garden area featuring rectangular planting beds

agents.ego_description: walking through a formal garden area with empty rectangular planters and scattered benches

entered.detail: rectangular stone-bordered planting beds, empty and overgrown

segments.scene_description: Exiting the pergola, the character explores a formal garden space with empty rectangular planters and additional benches, the heavy fog persisting throughout the abandoned park.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a fog-shrouded park that transitions from a narrow pathway into a sheltered walkway and finally onto an open terrace. It begins with the character walking along a misty path bordered by stone balustrades and bare trees, moving steadily toward a set of stone steps that disappear into the haze. As the character ascends these weathered steps, the scene shifts into a pergola walkway where hanging vines create a dense, sheltered passage through the fog. The camera then emerges from the greenery onto an open terrace, passing empty wooden benches and a tall ivy-covered brick wall before finally turning near a vintage street lamp.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered confines of a vine-covered walkway into the open, desolate expanse of a formal garden. It begins with the character retracing their steps through a draped pergola, moving steadily alongside a stone balustrade that overlooks the fog-shrouded depths of the park. As the character exits the overhead greenery, the environment opens up into a wide garden space characterized by empty rectangular planters and lonely benches. The scene then expands further into the abandoned grounds, where the heavy, desaturated fog persists, blurring the edges of the historic architecture.
